response: DataFlow AI, a data infrastructure startup founded in 2022, has successfully raised $8.5M in Series A funding, achieving a valuation of $42M. With a team of 18 people, the company is experiencing robust growth, boasting a 25% month-over-month increase and a Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR) of $120K, backed by notable investors such as Sequoia and Y Combinator (YC).
